meaning: n.海湾,深渊,漩涡,隔阂vt.吞没,使深深卷入
examples: A crisis was rapidly developing in the Gulf.
The tremor was centred in the Gulf of Sirte.
The low, marshy land runs out for miles toward the gulf.
He made a fortune in 2007, buying Chinese, Indian and Gulf States stocks and non-U.S. currencies.
In 1987, Gangel covered the Iran-Iraq war as part of the Pentagon pool in the Persian Gulf.
